allow: Bash(DB_HOST=localhost DB_PORT=3306 DB_USER=root DB_PASSWORD=password DB_NAME=ai node reset_task.js 1)
Bash(DB_HOST=localhost DB_PORT=3306 DB_USER=root DB_PASSWORD=password DB_NAME=testdb node reset_task.js 1)

Bash(DB_HOST=localhost DB_PORT=3306 DB_USER=root DB_PASSWORD=password node -e "const mysql = require\(''mysql2/promise''\); \(async \(\) => { const conn = await mysql.createConnection\({host: ''localhost'', port: 3306, user: ''root'', password: ''password''}\); const [dbs] = await conn.query\(''SHOW DATABASES''\); console.log\(dbs.map\(d => d.Database\)\); await conn.end\(\); }\)\(\)")

Bash(DB_HOST=localhost DB_PORT=3306 DB_USER=root DB_PASSWORD=password DB_NAME=ai node -e "const mysql = require\(''mysql2/promise''\); \(async \(\) => { const conn = await mysql.createConnection\({host: ''localhost'', port: 3306, user: ''root'', password: ''password'', database: ''ai''}\); const [tables] = await conn.query\(''SHOW TABLES''\); console.log\(tables.map\(t => Object.values\(t\)[0]\)\); await conn.end\(\); }\)\(\)")
Bash(DB_HOST=localhost DB_PORT=3306 DB_USER=root DB_PASSWORD=password DB_NAME=ai node -e ":*)
